┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  🔐 AI Secret Scanner - Quick Ref               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

📦 INSTALL
  npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk

🔑 GET API KEY
  https://console.anthropic.com/ → Create API Key

⚙️  SETUP GITHUB
  Settings → Secrets → New secret
  Name:  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
  Value: sk-ant-api...

🧪 LOCAL TEST
  export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="sk-ant-api..."
  node .github/scripts/secret-scanner.js changed

📊 HOW IT WORKS

  ┌────────────────┐
  │  Code Change   │
  └───────┬────────┘
          │
          ▼
  ┌────────────────┐     Yes    ┌──────────────┐
  │  API Key Set?  │ ─────────▶ │  Claude AI   │
  └───────┬────────┘             └──────┬───────┘
          │ No                          │
          │                             │
          ▼                             ▼
  ┌────────────────┐            ┌──────────────┐
  │  Regex Mode    │            │  AI Analysis │
  └───────┬────────┘            └──────┬───────┘
          │                             │
          └──────────┬──────────────────┘
                     ▼
            ┌────────────────┐
            │  Verify Real   │
            │    Secrets     │
            └───────┬────────┘
                    ▼
            ┌────────────────┐
            │     Report     │
            │  + Fix Tips    │
            └────────────────┘

✅ ADVANTAGES
  • Fewer false positives (AI understands context)
  • Detects obfuscated secrets
  • Smart fix recommendations
  • Auto-fallback to regex mode

🚨 CURRENT FINDINGS IN YOUR REPO
  • 6 CRITICAL: MongoDB URIs, Redis URLs
  • 9 HIGH:     API Keys, JWT Secrets
  → Check .env files are gitignored ✓
  → Rotate exposed credentials!

💰 COST
  ~$0.003 per file
  ~$0.015 per PR (5 files)
  ~$1-5 per month

🔗 MORE INFO
  .github/scripts/README.md
  .github/scripts/SETUP_SUMMARY.md

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Ready to secure your codebase! Just add the API key! 🚀       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
